'''√b-v-?''' ('''bva''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:drink|drink]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:drink|drink]]
|-
! Citation form
| √b-v-?
|-
! Lemma
| bva
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibava?|thibava?]] || [[word:jibava?|jibava?]] || [[word:shibava?|shibava?]] || [[word:kibava?|kibava?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubava?|thuthubava?]] || [[word:jujubava?|jujubava?]] || [[word:shushubava?|shushubava?]] || [[word:kukubava?|kukubava?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubava?|thubava?]] || [[word:jubava?|jubava?]] || [[word:shubava?|shubava?]] || [[word:kubava?|kubava?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubava?|thubava?]] || [[word:jubava?|jubava?]] || [[word:shubava?|shubava?]] || [[word:kubava?|kubava?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebava?|thebava?]] || [[word:jebava?|jebava?]] || [[word:shebava?|shebava?]] || [[word:kebava?|kebava?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobava?|thothobava?]] || [[word:jojobava?|jojobava?]] || [[word:shoshobava?|shoshobava?]] || [[word:kokobava?|kokobava?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobava?|thobava?]] || [[word:jobava?|jobava?]] || [[word:shobava?|shobava?]] || [[word:kobava?|kobava?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobava?|thobava?]] || [[word:jobava?|jobava?]] || [[word:shobava?|shobava?]] || [[word:kobava?|kobava?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæbava?|thæbava?]] || [[word:jæbava?|jæbava?]] || [[word:shæbava?|shæbava?]] || [[word:kæbava?|kæbava?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabava?|thathabava?]] || [[word:jajabava?|jajabava?]] || [[word:shashabava?|shashabava?]] || [[word:kakabava?|kakabava?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabava?|thabava?]] || [[word:jabava?|jabava?]] || [[word:shabava?|shabava?]] || [[word:kabava?|kabava?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabava?|thabava?]] || [[word:jabava?|jabava?]] || [[word:shabava?|shabava?]] || [[word:kabava?|kabava?]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabava?|shabava?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabava?|goshabava?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabava?|gokishabava?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabava?nü|shabava?nü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabava?nknü|goshabava?nknü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabava?nü|gokishabava?nü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabava?shë|shabava?shë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabava?nkshë|goshabava?nkshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabava?shë|gokishabava?shë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabava?ro|shabava?ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabava?nkro|goshabava?nkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabava?ro|gokishabava?ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabava?mu|shabava?mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabava?nkmu|goshabava?nkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabava?mu|gokishabava?mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabava?sher|shabava?sher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabava?nksher|goshabava?nksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabava?sher|gokishabava?sher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabava?ng|shabava?ng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabava?nkng|goshabava?nkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabava?ng|gokishabava?ng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabava?ya|shabava?ya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabava?nkya|goshabava?nkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabava?ya|gokishabava?ya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabava?yam|shabava?yam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabava?nkyam|goshabava?nkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabava?yam|gokishabava?yam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabava?nüshë|shabava?nüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabava?nknüshë|goshabava?nknüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabava?nüshë|gokishabava?nüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabava?nüro|shabava?nüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabava?nknüro|goshabava?nknüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabava?nüro|gokishabava?nüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabava?nümu|shabava?nümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabava?nknümu|goshabava?nknümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabava?nümu|gokishabava?nümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabava?shënü|shabava?shënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabava?nkshënü|goshabava?nkshënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabava?shënü|gokishabava?shënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabava?shëro|shabava?shëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabava?nkshëro|goshabava?nkshëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabava?shëro|gokishabava?shëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabava?shëmu|shabava?shëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabava?nkshëmu|goshabava?nkshëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabava?shëmu|gokishabava?shëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabava?ronü|shabava?ronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabava?nkronü|goshabava?nkronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabava?ronü|gokishabava?ronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabava?roshë|shabava?roshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabava?nkroshë|goshabava?nkroshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabava?roshë|gokishabava?roshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabava?romu|shabava?romu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabava?nkromu|goshabava?nkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabava?romu|gokishabava?romu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabava?munü|shabava?munü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabava?nkmunü|goshabava?nkmunü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabava?munü|gokishabava?munü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabava?mushë|shabava?mushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabava?nkmushë|goshabava?nkmushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabava?mushë|gokishabava?mushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabava?muro|shabava?muro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabava?nkmuro|goshabava?nkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabava?muro|gokishabava?muro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
